appraisal_events.evidence: « Robert de Saint-Loup ici ! Mais je n’ai pas même eu un mot de lui ; je crois que je ne l’ai pas vu depuis Balbec. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Mme de Villeparisis registers Robert’s neglect (no word, no visit since Balbec), which functions as a mild reproach and locally lowers his standing with her.

status_effects.explanation: He is locally judged as neglectful by his aunt, which diminishes his immediate personal appraisal.
